title: 2 Pack Qtip Holder Glass Apothecary Jars with Lids Bathroom Accessories Vanity Organizers and Makeup Storage Canister for Cotton Ball, Cotton Swab, Floss, Candy, Clear
description:
About this item
Ideal Size and Multifunctional Storage - 2 pack Qtip Holder, 10oz, 3.35" Wide, 4.92" Height, Clear glass jar with lid dispenser for such as Q-tip, cotton balls, cotton swabs, cotton rounds, floss picks, tampons, bath salts, hair tie band, makeup brush, beauty egg, face brush, crayons, candy, pens, clip, and more small things
Carved design - artistic three-dimensional carved glass, exquisite texture under light and shadow refraction, INS style, light luxury, superior style, can be used as storage, also served as home decoration, suitable for all kinds of furniture style
Exceptional quality - Glass apothecary jars with lids made of healthy lead-free crystal glass, crystal clear jar body strong glass heavy, thickened non-slip bottle bottom, durable
Easy to store and clean - Simple shape, transparent texture, wide mouth design jar mouth loading easy, easy to take things, thick glass texture, water rinsing is not easy to break, more durable than ordinary glass jars
Perfect choice: These crystal jars can be placed on the bathroom countertop, guest bath, vanity top, laundry room, makeup table, nightstand, lazy Susan, or dining room table. Ideal for your friends, family, and relatives on many occasions, such as birthdays, housewarmings, weddings, Thanksgiving, Halloween, and Christmas
reviews_5s:
Well made. Q-tops fit perfectly. Looks nice in my bathroom.These jars are nice quality and look good. They are what were expected from the description. Shipped quickly and securelyBeautiful; nice weightThese little jars are just big enough to hold Q-tips, cotton swabs and etc., and basically whatever you need them for. They are attractive on my bathroom shelves. I bought two sets of these in the pink and multi color. They actually look great.Perfect size for qtips and plackers. Adds a touch of beauty to store mundane items.I bought this mostly because it was pretty. But I have found it to be pleasingly convenient too! The unsealed openings on the back of Q-tip boxes have always bothered me. I like this little jar because it is better at keeping Q-tips clean, and makes them much easier to access.Well made, pretty jar. I use it or Q-tip storage.I have one in my guest bath and one in the master bath. Perfect size for Q-Tips.
The lid does not seal tight. But I am fine with that. Easy to clean.Decorative and I like the Smokey grey color. So far no issues with them. They match the other decor in the room.These jars are very pretty. I’m using both in the bathroom to hold cotton pads and q tips. Well worth the money.
reviews_1s: one of my jars was brokenReceived two q tips jar with one lid. No concern for customerUpon opening box I noticed a very strong chemical smell. I was unhappily surprised to find both crystal pieces had a very sticky film & had a gross chemical smell possibly from processing. Both pieces were dusty & probally a return, nasty.I sent this item back. I opened the brown box it was mailed in and it was in perfect condition. Once opened there were two boxes with the glass pieces inside. You could hear and see the glass shards inside/sliding around the brown box from one of the jars breaking. I didn’t bother checking any further and sealed it up and sent it back. I don’t even want it anymore.
